title: geranium orientale
intro: Geranium orientale, also known as the Oriental Geranium, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Middle East and Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and swelling, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Geranium orientale include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for a range of health issues. Herbal preparations of Geranium orientale often include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
